case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. ARMANDO J MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, ARMANDO J (SBN 138799) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, ARMANDO J (SBN 138799) $8,655.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,051.87 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, $147.00 FOR CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,053.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA SERVED MAR-10-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, ARMANDO J (SBN 138799)
